markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

Discuss plans for migrating off Airtable/Aerops and building out GrowthX's content production platform, including core functionality, user experience, and data model considerations.

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to migrate off Airtable/Aerops by June 16th deadline; focusing on replicating core production workflows first](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Aiming to build a more streamlined UX for editors that guides them through the content creation process step-by-step](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Planning to create a "content inventory" system to track published content, performance metrics, and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)
  - [Discussing how to model and store contextual information ("artifacts") to improve content quality and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)

## Topics

### Current Platform Architecture

  - [Using Airtable as project management database and Aerops for workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Challenges with current setup: data spread across tools, lack of learning/improvement over time](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Need to replicate core functionality while improving UX and adding capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Current process: Ideation \> Assignment creation \> Production \> Staging \> Publishing](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Want to guide editors through process step-by-step rather than grid view](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Discussing how to model assignments, production steps, reviews, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2856.0)
  - [Considering ways to capture learnings/improvements at each step](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=3702.0)

### Content Inventory System

  - [Proposed system to track all published content, metrics, opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2428.0)
  - [Would pull data from sitemap, analytics, SEO tools](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Allows strategic view of content performance and gaps](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Critical for demonstrating value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

### Contextual Information ("Artifacts")

  - [Need way to store/retrieve contextual info like company facts, style guides, personas](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Discussing how to model different types: facts, preferences, instructions, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Want system to learn and suggest improvements over time](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2531.0)
  - [Exploring ways to dynamically insert relevant context into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### User Experience Considerations

  - [Want to move away from grid view for most tasks](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=3250.0)
  - [Discussing guided, step-by-step flow for editors](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=4151.0)
  - [Exploring ways to provide context and instructions inline](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Considering how to handle reviews, approvals, iterations](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=3523.0)

### Data Model & Architecture

  - [Discussing how to model accounts, projects, assignments, content items](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
  - [Exploring options for storing contextual information](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [Considering how to enable experimentation and learning over time](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)
  - [Debating level of customization to allow per client](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=3330.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue development on core production workflow functionality](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Start planning content inventory system implementation](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Further flesh out data model for contextual information](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Explore options for workflow creation/customization interface](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Begin preparing for data migration from existing systems](https://fathom.video/share/asdWPDy7Hmj7EDYi5UVHbMDM8592TRvj?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
